# `planemo output_schema`

Export JSON Schemas for Planemo machine-readable outputs.

## Synopsis

```text
planemo output_schema [OPTIONS]
```


## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Help |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| --schema | choice | — | — | Only export one schema. |
